title: What Is a Digital Support Retainer (And Does Your Business Need One)?
subtitle: The Honest Guide to Ongoing Tech Support — What You Actually Get and Whether It Is Worth It
description: Understand what a digital support retainer is, what it includes, and whether your business would benefit from one. Plain-English guide covering costs, what to look for, and how retainers compare to one-off fixes.
author: James Plant

metadata.title: What Is a Digital Support Retainer (And Does Your Business Need One)? | The Bearded Developer
